name: Cpt. D. Mercer
bio: Career officer; volunteered for the program after the first breach. A decade of deployments, some beyond even the Director's clearance. By the book: fast, efficient, no loose ends.

name: Dr. A. Okafor
bio: Astrophysicist. Decoded the gate's address notation in six weeks. Field-certified — outshot half the security detail on the range.

name: Seryn Vael
bio: First Blade of the Luminous One, foremost of the Graced. The Portion's grace is leaving him a day at a time — the sword arm that remains is his own.
